title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 455.005 - Social Security number of respondent included in full orders of protection
text:
455.005.  Social Security number of respondent included in full orders of protection. — All full orders of protection issued pursuant to this chapter shall include the Social Security number of the respondent, if known.
(L. 2000 H.B. 1677, et al. § 455.550)
